content:
✅ Completed task-005 - UI Pixel Perfect completed: 
- Added tabular-nums for number alignment
- Consistent py-2.5/px-3 cell padding across all tables
- Added overflow-x-auto with table-scroll for mobile
- min-w-[600-800px] for horizontal scroll on mobile
- Sticky headers on all tables
- Medal colors for top 3 in leaders (gold/silver/bronze)
- Consistent orange-400/cyan-400 color scheme
- Added whitespace-nowrap for player names
